title: citharexylum flexuosum
intro: Citharexylum flexuosum, also known as the "Flexuous shrub" or "Whitebrush", is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citharexylum flexuosum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
